title: MikroTik Power Adapter 24V 1.2A, angled plug
description: Original MikroTik power adapter with direct installation in a socket with a standard 5.5 / 2.1mm connector designed for powering MikroTik devices with an input voltage 24V DC . The power adapter has a maximum power of 29W and a maximum output current of 1.2A . The connector is angled with 90° GPSR Technical support for this product is available on [email protected] email or sending a request via web form . Our technical support is available during this business hours
